content:
Today I volunteered at Aviana's school - Silver Oak Elementary,

Kids were celebrating the Gold Rush Day. It was fun.

Also asked Shelly - what's going on with you? In the last few days, you called cops at home, called white house and even emailed white house on sunday. What is happening? How can we help? However, she didnt answer.

I constantly tell her start owning things, its okay bad things happen, we do bad things sometimes. But just own, learn and make improvements from there. But still no response. This bothers me honestly and i feel little scared too.
